text:
Created attachment 170878
patch with update to 3.6.0

Hello,

attached a patch to update both ports to its current version. Buildtests are fine for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. portlint is also fine. I also did a short runtime test using irb.

Greetings,
Torsten
